title: Rich Tender Energizing Norwegian Beans Stir-fry
description: This Rich Tender Energizing Norwegian Beans Stir-fry is a vibrant and nutritious dish that features dulce de leche for added richness. It's perfect as an energizing breakfast or snack, vegetarian-friendly, and can be pressure-cooked for convenience.
instructions: Wash and soak black beans in water for at least 4 hours or overnight.
Preheat your pressure cooker. Add soaked beans, snap peas, red bell pepper, garlic cloves, dulce de leche, soy sauce, and oil to the cooker.
Secure the lid on the pressure cooker and cook on high pressure according to your model's instructions (typically 15-20 minutes).
Let the beans naturally release steam for about a minute before opening the lid. Adjust seasoning if needed.
Garnish with fresh herbs like parsley or cilantro, if desired.
